management demonstration project) is counted as an MA month. 

Use caution interpreting this field since months that are not counted as HMO months for this variable 
include months of fee-for-service (FFS) coverage and months the beneficiary is not enrolled in 
Medicare. In other words — do not assume that every month during the year is either an HMO month 
or FFS month.
